summary: Iteration 216 â€” 3 P1 Features Testing. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 3 features verified â€” Ponte Periziaâ†’Preventivatore button visible and working, Sistema Notifiche Proattive returns ITT alerts with urgency levels, Report CAM Mensile PDF generates valid PDF.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: per_test_ponte_8baac379 (perizia with voci_costo), welders with expiring qualifications, instrument with calibration due tomorrow, ITT verbale due in 25 days
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 216 P1 features fully tested. 1) Ponte Periziaâ†’Preventivatore: POST /api/perizie/{perizia_id}/genera-preventivo creates new preventivo with perizia_source metadata, updates perizia with preventivo_id/preventivo_number linking. Frontend button 'Genera Preventivo da Perizia' (data-testid='btn-ponte-preventivo') visible in PeriziaEditorPage Riepilogo step. 2) Sistema Notifiche Proattive: POST /api/notifications/check-now returns welder_alerts, instrument_alerts, itt_alerts with urgency field (scaduto/critico/urgente/alert). Email sent via Resend when alerts exist. 3) Report CAM Mensile: GET /api/cam/report-mensile/pdf generates valid PDF with KPIs, per-commessa table, trend bars, quarterly projection. Frontend button 'Report CAM Mensile (PDF)' (data-testid='btn-report-cam-mensile') visible in ExecutiveDashboardPage CAM Safety Gate section.
